title: Cobblemon modpack + rubius
description: Public and free Cobblemon modpack for Fabric 1.21.1, inspired by the mods used by ElRubius, focused on exploration, adventure and capturing Pokémon (Not official).
body:
Cobblemon is a modpack that combines the best of Minecraft with the essence of Pokémon, offering a completely renewed adventure and exploration experience. In this world, Pokémon appear naturally in biomes, with animations, behaviors and models faithful to the original saga. You can capture them, train them, trade them, and build your team while still playing Minecraft as normal.

The modpack typically includes quality of life improvements, performance optimization, and exploration mods that make the world more alive and interesting. The progression is based on both the classic Minecraft trailer and the growth of your Pokémon team, encouraging exploration, strategic combat, and cooperation with other players.

Ideal for playing alone or on servers, Cobblemon achieves a balanced integration between both universes, without losing the sandbox essence of Minecraft or the excitement of becoming a true Pokémon trainer.
